svg.text: STAGE 2 — whole‑word profiles, one class at a time
Read this list aloud. Click on any
the word MOVES to its correct group (V‑initial)
OK: These are all consonant initial
this list is verified for this check
Read this list aloud. Click on any
the word MOVES to its correct group (V‑final)
OK: These are all consonant final
this list is verified for this check
Read this list aloud. Click on any
the word MOVES to its correct count (1 or 3)
this list is verified for this check

g.text: …belongs in which group? (by Whole Citation Word Syllable Profile)
This word doesn’t belong in this C2V profile at all…
the word joins the profile (profile unverified)
Read this list aloud. Click on
this word leaves the group (back onto the pile)
We are joining these profiles; which is correct?
